generation_inputs.topic_cluster: Implementing automatic caching with single cache_control field

post.topic: optimizing claude api costs with prompt caching strategies
post.hook: How to cut Claude API costs by 90% with smart prompt caching
post.caption: Smart prompt caching can drastically reduce your Claude API bills. Set cache_control: {"type": "ephemeral"} on system prompts and long contexts that repeat across requests. Claude caches up to 5 minutes, perfect for chat sessions or batch processing. Key wins: system prompts with examples, document contexts, and conversation history. Cache hit = 90% cost reduction on cached tokens. Pro tip: Structure prompts with cacheable content first, then dynamic user input. Your wallet will thank you when processing thousands of similar requests! 💰
